mapper.sql: dc.id, dc.user_id, dc.content, dc.create_time, dc.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diary_circle_like dcl WHERE dcl.diary_circle_id = dc.id) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.circle_id = dc.id) AS comment_count
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO diary_circle (user_id, content, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE diary_circle SET content = #{content}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT , u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id WHERE dc.id = #{id}
SELECT , u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id ORDER BY dc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT , u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id WHERE dc.user_id IN ( SELECT CASE WHEN fr.from_user_id = #{userId} THEN fr.to_user_id ELSE fr.from_user_id END FROM friend_request fr WHERE fr.status = 1 AND (fr.from_user_id = #{userId} OR fr.to_user_id = #{userId}) ) ORDER BY dc.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT , u.name, u.avatar FROM diary_circle dc LEFT JOIN user u ON dc.user_id = u.id WHERE dc.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY dc.create_time DESC
